description_long: This is a modern rectangular table with a flat, smooth tabletop and four straight legs. The tabletop appears to be made of a solid, light gray material, likely metal or laminate, giving it a clean and minimalist look. The legs are slender and metallic, with two legs on each of the shorter sides, and one leg on each side is black while the others are gray, adding a subtle visual contrast. The table's design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban environments such as parks, public plazas, or outdoor seating areas. There are no visible decorative elements, drawers, or additional features, emphasizing its functional purpose. The overall construction suggests durability and ease of maintenance for high-traffic urban settings.
description: A modern, rectangular table with a smooth light gray top and four slender metal legs, two of which are black for contrast. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for urban outdoor or public use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular tabletop and all four legs, with the two black legs clearly visible on the left and right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow edge of the tabletop and the alignment of the two legs on this side, both appearing gray.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the tabletop and all four legs visible, including the two black legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the tabletop's thin profile and the two supporting legs.
